---
name: 'Define Feature'
description: 'Create or refine a testable feature specification with REQ and AC identifiers and evaluate its Definition of Ready.'
argument-hint: 'Describe the problem, target users, evidence, constraints, and desired outcome.'
agent: 'Spec'
tools: ['read', 'search']
---

# Define Feature

Create or refine one feature specification using the repository template.
Separate facts from assumptions, identify questions that can change behavior,
and return a complete Ready checklist. Do not create an implementation plan.
